character.bio: A globally popular dance music superstar, Dee Jay is always ready to have a good time. With a burning love for music and fighting, this Jamaican sensation drives audiences wild with hot new songs and stylish moves.

deejay_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Can be canceled up until the 2nd active frameForces the opponent into a standing position

deejay_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: * 4 frames of recovery are added if the attack missesAdds +18 of frame advantage on Punish Counter

deejay_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: * 1 frames of recovery are added if the attack misses

deejay_crouching_medium_kick_m.note: Forces a Hard Knockdown on Punish Counter

deejay_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionAdds +12 of frame advantage on Punish Counter

deejay_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

deejay_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay_sunrise_heel_m.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay_face_breaker_h.note: Does 800 individual damage when the attack lands on a mid-air opponentForces a juggle state when the first attack lands on a mid-air opponentForces the opponent into a standing position

deejay_dee_jay_special_2.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay_funky_dance_2.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay_party_in_the_air.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay_speedy_maracas.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
deejay_speedy_maracas.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) ↓↓ + PP
deejay_speedy_maracas.note: Super Art gauge increases by 2000 on frame 22Super Art gauge increases by 49 every frame after frame 46Extend the move by holding down the button during its execution

deejay_m_air_slasher_m.note: * Can be canceled into Speedy Maracas on frame 23

deejay_h_air_slasher_h.note: * Can be canceled into Speedy Maracas on frames 35 - 36

deejay_od_air_slasher.note: * Can be canceled into Speedy Maracas on frames 31

deejay_l_jackknife_maximum_l.note: Considered airborne from frames 6 - 45Can be canceled into a normal jumping attack or a unique attack from frames 23 - 40

deejay_m_jackknife_maximum_m.note: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 44Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1- 5Invincible to throws from frames 5 - 6

deejay_h_jackknife_maximum_h.note: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 51Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1- 9Invincible to throws from frames 5 - 6

deejay_od_jackknife_maximum.note: Will only transition into the 4th and later attacks if the first three attacks hitCompletely invincible from frames 1 - 11Considered airborne from frames 5 - 62 (on block, or if the attack misses)

deejay_od_double_rolling_sobat.note: Can be canceled into a Level 2 or 3 Super Art or Critical Art only on the 2nd attack

deejay_l_machine_gun_uppercut_l.note: Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits

deejay_m_machine_gun_uppercut_m.note: Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits

deejay_h_machine_gun_uppercut_h.note: Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits

deejay_od_machine_gun_uppercut.note: Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hitsThe final attack forces a Hard Knockdown

deejay_jus_cool.note: Can transition into branching attacks from frames 13 - 24

deejay_od_jus_cool.note: 1 frames of recovery added when the attack is blockedCan transition into branching attacks from frames 25 - 39Can transition into Juggling Dash from frame 19

deejay_funky_slicer.note: 2 frames of recovery subtracted when attack is blockedAdds +3 frames of recovery on armor hit or if the attack misses

deejay_od_funky_slicer.note: Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponentAdds +5 frames of recovery on armor hit or if the attack misses

deejay_waning_moon.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponentAdds a ground bounding effect on Punish Counter

deejay_od_waning_moon.note: Adds a ground bounding effect during a mid-air hit

deejay_juggling_dash.note: Invincible to projectiles from frames 1 - 20Can transition to Juggling Sway from frames 17 - 23

deejay_od_juggling_dash.note: Invincible to projectiles from frames 1 - 20Can transition to Juggling Sway from frames 16 - 17

deejay_juggling_sway.note: Can be canceled into follow-up attacks except for Juggling Dash from frames 17 - 25

deejay_od_juggling_sway.note: Can be canceled into follow-up attacks except for Juggling Dash from frames 13 - 18

deejay_sa1_the_greatest_sobat.note: Punish Counter properties- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Produces a wall bounce when hitting a mid-air opponentValues do not change on counter or Punish CounterMinimum guaranteed damage is 30%

deejay_sa2_lowkey_sunrise_festival_l.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 16Can only go into the following attacks if the first attack hitsCan transition to the 2nd attack from frames 18 - 30Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterMinimum guaranteed damage is 40%

deejay_sa2_lowkey_sunrise_festival_2.note: Can transition to the 3rd attack from frames 19 - 24

deejay_sa2_lowkey_sunrise_festival_3.note: Can transition to the 4th attack from frames 17 - 23

deejay_sa2_lowkey_sunrise_festival_6.note: Can transition to the 7th attack from frames 31 - 36

deejay_sa2_marvelous_sunrise_festival_7.note: Can transition to a branching attack from frames 11 - 36

deejay_sa3_weekend_pleasure.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
deejay_sa3_weekend_pleasure.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
deejay_sa3_weekend_pleasure.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%*Can only be canceled into from special moves

deejay_ca_weekend_pleasure.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
deejay_ca_weekend_pleasure.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
deejay_ca_weekend_pleasure.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%*Can only be canceled into from special moves

deejay_diss_track.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

deejay_flip_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

deejay_drive_impact_wild_beat.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

deejay_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
deejay_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
deejay_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

deejay_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

deejay_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
deejay_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
deejay_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

deejay_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

deejay_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

deejay_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

deejay_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
deejay_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
deejay_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
